description: This pipeline sets properties of ROIs and converts them to masks. The main steps involve setting user-defined properties for all ROIs and converting the modified ROIs to masks.

f4f58751-712a-40bf-a96e-20c4ddbdf8ed.name: ij1-roi-filter-by-overlap
f4f58751-712a-40bf-a96e-20c4ddbdf8ed.description:
Filters the ROI lists by testing for mutual overlap. The ROI1 output contains all ROI1 input ROI that overlap with any of ROI2. The ROI2 output contains all ROI2 input ROI that overlap with a ROI1 ROI.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

a66e039d-2559-4cba-a7ed-3dc8c8267249.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
a66e039d-2559-4cba-a7ed-3dc8c8267249.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. The line and fill color is stored within the ROI themselves. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

2e3dd5ee-2e1c-4143-b62a-2369900119c8.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
2e3dd5ee-2e1c-4143-b62a-2369900119c8.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. The line and fill color is stored within the ROI themselves. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

6a808ed9-ee0c-4a67-b9fc-cf23dc8781f1.name: ij1-roi-set-properties
6a808ed9-ee0c-4a67-b9fc-cf23dc8781f1.description: Sets properties of all Roi to a user-defined value.

49af5775-32f8-48b7-829a-aadd46db414e.name: ij1-roi-set-properties
49af5775-32f8-48b7-829a-aadd46db414e.description: Sets properties of all Roi to a user-defined value.

16efae9b-f03a-4133-8ab1-444c163117c3.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
16efae9b-f03a-4133-8ab1-444c163117c3.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. The line and fill color is stored within the ROI themselves. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
